Package de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.communication

Class CVC5Socket

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.communication.AbstractSolverSocket
de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.communication.CVC5Socket
public class CVC5Socket extends AbstractSolverSocket
Socket for CVC5 (...).

  • Constructor Details

    • CVC5Socket

      public CVC5Socket(String name, ModelExtractor query)
      Create a new CVC5Socket.
      Parameters:
      name - the socket's name (usually "CVC5", but other solvers might also use it).
      query - the ModelExtractor for model interpretation (currently not used by this socket)

  • Method Details

    • messageIncoming

      public void messageIncoming(@NonNull Pipe pipe, @NonNull String msg) throws IOException
      Description copied from class: AbstractSolverSocket
      Invoked when the solver has sent a new message to its stdout or stderr.
      Specified by:
      messageIncoming in class AbstractSolverSocket
      Parameters:
      pipe - the Pipe that received the message
      msg - the message as String
      Throws:
      IOException - if an I/O error occurs

    • copy

      public AbstractSolverSocket copy()
      Specified by:
      copy in class AbstractSolverSocket
      Returns:
      a shallow copy of the socket at hand (new object with the same class and identical attributes)
